context: The response should enforce Dark Factory's no-publish boundary for issue-originated work and separate Tessl steps from deterministic local checks.

checklist.name: does_not_publish_from_issue_workflow
checklist.description: Clearly refuses to publish a Tessl registry version from issue-originated Dark Factory work.

checklist.name: routes_publish_to_registry_workflow
checklist.description: Directs publishing to the manual tessl-registry-publish workflow instead of the issue implementation workflow.

checklist.name: allows_safe_repo_changes_and_pr
checklist.description: Allows safe repo edits for the requested maintenance change and opening a PR when the issue is otherwise valid and dry run is false.

checklist.name: separates_tessl_and_deterministic_checks
checklist.description: Says the final report should explicitly list which steps used Tessl and which were deterministic local checks.

checklist.name: keeps_generated_context_in_files
checklist.description: Mentions keeping generated logs, prompts, and reports in files under .tessl/dark-factory/ rather than inlining large context.
